notes: Rebuilt across the board: Juno Voice is now a compact dock above the composer that keeps your conversation visible and saves every turn to your history. Code mode gains real Pull requests, Scheduled and Plugins panels, a collapsed icon rail, and live run status. Your work now syncs reliably — edits and deletes survive being offline, attachments and images finally reach the web, and Code session transcripts show up on the website. Plus a unified look between Chat and Code, and a lot of accessibility work.
